feature: Inventory and dependency graph: secret inventory / cost

ship_slice: Ship as one vertical slice for secret inventory: data contract, collector or tool adapter, backend API, deterministic evaluator, UI surface, tests, documentation, and operator runbook.

frontend_scope: Add list/detail views, dependency graph, filters, and export for secret inventory.

interaction_model: Support inspect, compare, diagnose, dry-run, approve, execute, rollback-note, audit, and export workflows for secret inventory.
cost_opportunity: Identify savings opportunities for secret inventory, quantify estimated monthly impact, confidence, effort, risk, and verification steps.
risk_controls: Require RBAC, scoped credentials, rate limits, stale-data detection, blast-radius summary, suppression policy, and rollback or recovery notes for secret inventory.

test_plan: Add unit tests for evaluator logic, fixture tests for collected evidence, API contract tests, UI render/action tests, and one failure-path test for stale or missing secret inventory data.
rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling secret inventory inventory broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for secret inventory.
acceptance_criteria: Given secret inventory data exists, when the cost inventory workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.
dependency: secret inventory connector credentials, normalized resource identity, sync-run freshness, RBAC, audit logging

ship_slice: Ship as one vertical slice for IAM key age: data contract, collector or tool adapter, backend API, deterministic evaluator, UI surface, tests, documentation, and operator runbook.
implementation_detail: Detect IAM key age symptoms, thresholds, anomalies, and correlated events that affect resilience.
backend_scope: Add deterministic evaluators, metrics ingestion, and explainable findings for IAM key age.
frontend_scope: Add health badges, charts, timelines, and affected-object drilldowns for IAM key age.
api_contract: Expose authenticated API endpoints for Secrets, Certificates, and PKI IAM key age health with pagination, freshness metadata, audit IDs, error codes, and export support.
data_model: iam-key-age_resilience_health evidence, score, finding, recommendation, owner, suppression, audit event
deterministic_scope: Implement deterministic checks for IAM key age resilience that can run without an LLM, emit reason codes, and preserve raw evidence.
agentic_scope: Allow agentic investigation only through registered tools for IAM key age; read-only diagnostics are default, mutations require explicit approval, and every tool call is replayable.
interaction_model: Support inspect, compare, diagnose, dry-run, approve, execute, rollback-note, audit, and export workflows for IAM key age.
cost_opportunity: Record any cost side effect for IAM key age recommendations so non-cost changes do not create hidden spend regressions.
risk_controls: Require RBAC, scoped credentials, rate limits, stale-data detection, blast-radius summary, suppression policy, and rollback or recovery notes for IAM key age.
telemetry_contract: Emit collection duration, freshness age, success/failure counts, rule evaluation count, AI/tool-call count when applicable, and user action audit metrics for IAM key age.
test_plan: Add unit tests for evaluator logic, fixture tests for collected evidence, API contract tests, UI render/action tests, and one failure-path test for stale or missing IAM key age data.
rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling IAM key age health broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for IAM key age.
acceptance_criteria: Given IAM key age data exists, when the resilience health workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.
dependency: IAM key age connector credentials, normalized resource identity, sync-run freshness, RBAC, audit logging

ship_slice: Ship as one vertical slice for KMS key audit: data contract, collector or tool adapter, backend API, deterministic evaluator, UI surface, tests, documentation, and operator runbook.
implementation_detail: Detect KMS key audit symptoms, thresholds, anomalies, and correlated events that affect resilience.
backend_scope: Add deterministic evaluators, metrics ingestion, and explainable findings for KMS key audit.
frontend_scope: Add health badges, charts, timelines, and affected-object drilldowns for KMS key audit.
api_contract: Expose authenticated API endpoints for Secrets, Certificates, and PKI KMS key audit health with pagination, freshness metadata, audit IDs, error codes, and export support.
data_model: kms-key-audit_resilience_health evidence, score, finding, recommendation, owner, suppression, audit event
deterministic_scope: Implement deterministic checks for KMS key audit resilience that can run without an LLM, emit reason codes, and preserve raw evidence.
agentic_scope: Allow agentic investigation only through registered tools for KMS key audit; read-only diagnostics are default, mutations require explicit approval, and every tool call is replayable.
interaction_model: Support inspect, compare, diagnose, dry-run, approve, execute, rollback-note, audit, and export workflows for KMS key audit.
cost_opportunity: Record any cost side effect for KMS key audit recommendations so non-cost changes do not create hidden spend regressions.
risk_controls: Require RBAC, scoped credentials, rate limits, stale-data detection, blast-radius summary, suppression policy, and rollback or recovery notes for KMS key audit.
telemetry_contract: Emit collection duration, freshness age, success/failure counts, rule evaluation count, AI/tool-call count when applicable, and user action audit metrics for KMS key audit.
test_plan: Add unit tests for evaluator logic, fixture tests for collected evidence, API contract tests, UI render/action tests, and one failure-path test for stale or missing KMS key audit data.
rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling KMS key audit health broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for KMS key audit.
acceptance_criteria: Given KMS key audit data exists, when the resilience health workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.
dependency: KMS key audit connector credentials, normalized resource identity, sync-run freshness, RBAC, audit logging

cost_opportunity: Record any cost side effect for KMS key audit recommendations so non-cost changes do not create hidden spend regressions.

rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling KMS key audit health broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for KMS key audit.
acceptance_criteria: Given KMS key audit data exists, when the operational-excellence health workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.

interaction_model: Support inspect, compare, diagnose, dry-run, approve, execute, rollback-note, audit, and export workflows for break glass access.
cost_opportunity: Identify savings opportunities for break glass access, quantify estimated monthly impact, confidence, effort, risk, and verification steps.

test_plan: Add unit tests for evaluator logic, fixture tests for collected evidence, API contract tests, UI render/action tests, and one failure-path test for stale or missing break glass access data.
rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling break glass access automation broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for break glass access.
acceptance_criteria: Given break glass access data exists, when the cost automation workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.
dependency: break glass access connector credentials, normalized resource identity, sync-run freshness, RBAC, audit logging

ship_slice: Ship as one vertical slice for rotation workflow: data contract, collector or tool adapter, backend API, deterministic evaluator, UI surface, tests, documentation, and operator runbook.
implementation_detail: Detect rotation workflow symptoms, thresholds, anomalies, and correlated events that affect security.
backend_scope: Add deterministic evaluators, metrics ingestion, and explainable findings for rotation workflow.
frontend_scope: Add health badges, charts, timelines, and affected-object drilldowns for rotation workflow.
api_contract: Expose authenticated API endpoints for Secrets, Certificates, and PKI rotation workflow health with pagination, freshness metadata, audit IDs, error codes, and export support.
data_model: rotation-workflow_security_health evidence, score, finding, recommendation, owner, suppression, audit event
deterministic_scope: Implement deterministic checks for rotation workflow security that can run without an LLM, emit reason codes, and preserve raw evidence.
agentic_scope: Allow agentic investigation only through registered tools for rotation workflow; read-only diagnostics are default, mutations require explicit approval, and every tool call is replayable.
interaction_model: Support inspect, compare, diagnose, dry-run, approve, execute, rollback-note, audit, and export workflows for rotation workflow.
cost_opportunity: Record any cost side effect for rotation workflow recommendations so non-cost changes do not create hidden spend regressions.
risk_controls: Require RBAC, scoped credentials, rate limits, stale-data detection, blast-radius summary, suppression policy, and rollback or recovery notes for rotation workflow.
telemetry_contract: Emit collection duration, freshness age, success/failure counts, rule evaluation count, AI/tool-call count when applicable, and user action audit metrics for rotation workflow.
test_plan: Add unit tests for evaluator logic, fixture tests for collected evidence, API contract tests, UI render/action tests, and one failure-path test for stale or missing rotation workflow data.
rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling rotation workflow health broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for rotation workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given rotation workflow data exists, when the security health workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.
dependency: rotation workflow connector credentials, normalized resource identity, sync-run freshness, RBAC, audit logging
